aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Platinum Refrigeration due to missing schema markup, lack of conversational content, and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC queries

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product schema for services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less relevant to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries that require rich, structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google Bard.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or FAQ content detected, despite high search opportunity score.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance site with schema markup, add conversational FAQ content, and boost GBP engagement to align with AI query trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share if action is delayed.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Platinum Refrigeration!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more AI-driven leads for your business.
page_title: Air Conditioning, Heating & Refrigeration | Platinum Refrigeration
